summary: FE-1: Shell + Routing — Vite/React/TS/Tailwind scaffold, layout, routes, placeholder pages
M1: Analysis Pipeline (Layer 1A Tier 1) — section segmentation, 8-bar snapping, EDM labeler, RGB waveform, storage
M0: Beat-Link Bridge (Layer 0) — WebSocket client, adapter, fallback, manager, Java JAR, 121 tests
M2: Live Cursor + Pioneer Enrichment (Layer 1B) — TrackCursor, enrichment, divergence, PlaybackTracker
M0B: USB Scanner + rbox metadata — usb_scanner, pioneer_metadata, ANLZ beatgrid reading
FE-3: Track Table — TanStack Table, search filtering, mood/source badges
FE-4: Upload & Analyze Flow — batch analyze, progress tracking, folder browser
FE-BLT: Bridge Page — BridgeStatusPanel, HardwareSelectionPanel, disconnect/reconnect handling
FE-2: Console — WebSocket + Console + Bridge Status (architect review PASS)
Audit backlog (2026-03-17) — 5 audit items resolved, 304 tests passing
BUG-BRIDGE-CYCLE: 6 root causes fixed for crash-restart on hardware disconnect/reconnect
Research: 11 findings completed — waveform sources, DLP track ID reliability, ANLZ formats, hardware topology, audio capture, fingerprinting, bridge data strategy, beat-link DLP bug trace

FE-Analysis-Viewer: Pioneer-style colored waveform with section overlays, section list, zoom/scroll, bidirectional interaction, metadata panels, page assembly — all 8 tasks complete, typecheck + build pass

FE-Live-Deck-Monitor: 2-deck stacked layout, auto-scrolling waveform cursor, composite key track resolution, playback_position_ms derivation from beatgrid, DeckPanel/DeckMetadata/SectionIndicator/DeckEmptyState — all 7 tasks complete, 193 tests pass, typecheck + build clean
Fix composite key threading: tracking.py now uses track_source_player/slot for lookup (was defaulting to '1'), added resolve endpoint, 4 new tests, 0 regressions

Pioneer waveform reading: UsbTrack reads PWV5/PWV3/PWV7 from ANLZ .EXT/.2EX files, stores as base64 in pioneer_metadata, serves decoded via GET /api/tracks/{fp}/pioneer-waveform. 17 new tests, 374 total pass, 0 regressions.

MEDIUM: Dual-database USB scanning — read both export.pdb (DeviceSQL) and exportLibrary.db (DLP) from USB to handle mixed hardware setups. Build O(N) file-path mapping between ID namespaces at scan time.
MEDIUM: Add DeckAnalysisState enum (available/pending/analyzing/unavailable) to TrackCursor for on-demand analysis fallback. Enables Live Deck Monitor to show appropriate loading states.
MEDIUM: Stale-scan detection — compare rbox metadata against stored analysis to detect USB re-exports where DLP IDs have been reassigned.
M3: Cue Stream (Layer 2) — section cues (section_change, anticipation, progress, energy_level). Spec complete. Blockers resolved (fe-analysis-viewer + fe-live-deck-monitor complete).
DEFERRED to M7: Custom constellation-map fingerprint generation (~500-800 lines, 2-3 dev-days). Standard hashing first; tempo-invariant later. No suitable library exists.

DEFERRED: Layer 0.5 audio capture prototype — USB interface + sounddevice for mixing ratio detection via informed source separation. Feasible (~0.5ms per update) but not needed until multi-deck Phase 2.
FE-2 remaining: Console panel wired to real-time bridge log output (currently placeholder)
FE-2-ADVISORY-1: Missing 'Reconnecting... (attempt N)' system entry during WS reconnection
FE-2-ADVISORY-2: Chevron direction differs from spec (cosmetic)
FE-2-ADVISORY-4: No tests for consoleStore ring buffer or consoleMapper diff detection
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-1: Faster interface detection polling (5s vs 30s) during waiting_for_hardware
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-2: Beat-link discovery cycle optimization
FE-BLT-FOLLOWUP-3: Interface-aware waiting_for_hardware messaging (requires contract change)
FE-BLT-QA-GAP-1: Mock tool / fixture data for DeviceInfo/PlayerInfo shapes for recovery testing

Bridge Finder Upgrade: beat-link 8.1.0-SNAPSHOT, all 6 Finders enabled, 5 new message types (track_metadata, beat_grid, waveform_detail, phrase_analysis, cue_points), ADR-017, bridge v2.0.0, 163 tests pass
ADR-015 composite key threading: 2 commits on fix/ADR-015-composite-pk-threading (ea1baac fix + 4a37189 resolve endpoint), 12/12 tracking tests pass, 3/3 resolve tests pass, ready for validator

M7 QA: 14/14 checks pass. TypeScript build clean, all Python modules parse, detector framework contracts verified, pipeline integration confirmed, frontend components validated, 385 tests pass (0 regressions). docs/interfaces.md updated to match actual API drum_patterns shape.

Rebuilt broken .venv (stale from directory move). Added psutil to pyproject.toml core deps (was unlisted). All analysis deps (librosa, ruptures, scipy, soundfile) now installed via pip install -e '.[analysis,dev]'.
Route fix button targeted stale en7 (from config/bridge.yaml). Updated to en16 to match current USB-Ethernet adapter. Root cause: config is static, doesn't auto-detect interface changes.

Live Deck Monitor: added bridge diagnostic data display on not-found state (shows all CDJ-reported fields), retry resolution button, improved messaging. DeckEmptyState + DeckPanel updated. Typecheck + build clean.

Bridge message recorder: scue/bridge/recorder.py (MessageRecorder class), 3 API endpoints (start/stop/status) at /api/bridge/record/*. Writes JSONL compatible with tools/mock_bridge.py. First capture: 2816 messages from live XDJ-AZ session.

Standalone bridge recorder UI: tools/recorder.html served at /tools/recorder via FastAPI FileResponse. Start/stop recording, live message count + duration, saves JSONL to tests/fixtures/bridge/. Fixed CORS issue (file:// origin blocked) by serving from backend same-origin.

Fixed docs/interfaces.md drum_patterns shape to match actual API response (bar_start/bar_end/flat slots vs old bar_index/start_time/nested slots). Also updated events example to show riser with payload.

Documented Live Deck Monitor track resolution bug in docs/bugs/frontend.md: analyzed tracks not recognized because analysis doesn't populate track_ids table (only USB scan does). Added retry button + diagnostic display as interim fix.

Finalized Pioneer waveform fallback QA: recorded emitTrackWaveform BLUE-style bug in docs/bugs/layer0-bridge.md, updated spec change log, 169 bridge tests pass, added beat-link-api-style-dispatch eval case.
Waveform Rendering Tuning Page: research (psychoacoustics, Pioneer encoding), skill doc (waveform-rendering.md), feature spec (364 lines). Implementation completed in wf-render-tuning-impl.

Annotation pre-populate (#2) + source tracking (#3): Load detector predictions as editable annotations when no ground truth exists. Tag annotations with source (predicted/corrected/manual). Save prediction snapshot on first save.

Waveform Rendering Tuning Page: backend preset API (6 endpoints, YAML storage), frontend page with parameter controls, modified WaveformCanvas with full render pipeline, Pioneer reference waveform, waveformPresetStore, app-wide preset integration. 4 seed presets. TypeScript strict passes.

Live Event Display: shared useActiveEvents hook + LiveEventDisplay component. Establishes single source of truth for 'what's active at time T' across annotation, live deck, and analysis pages. Spec: specs/feat-live-event-display/spec.md

Song Arrangement Engine proposal: 5-concept data model (sections/layers/events/patterns/transitions), tiered pipeline (quick <30s + deep 1-5min with stem separation), new Arrangement Page absorbing analysis+annotation views, 8-phase build path, 3 name candidates. Spec at specs/feat-arrangement-engine/proposal.md.

Strata Phase 0: Foundation. Data model (ArrangementFormula + 12 supporting dataclasses), per-tier file storage (strata/{fp}.{tier}.json), 6 REST API endpoints, TypeScript types, minimal /strata page with track picker + tier selector + empty/summary states, sidebar link. Typecheck clean, Python imports verified.

Strata Phase 1: Quick Tier Analysis Engine. 4 new modules: energy.py (per-band RMS at bar resolution, pseudo-layer activity), patterns.py (M7 DrumPattern -> Pattern conversion, cosine similarity clustering, auto-naming), transitions.py (section boundary energy deltas, fill detection from onset density spikes), engine.py (StrataEngine orchestrating stages A-E). Wired analyze endpoint (synchronous for quick tier). Updated StrataPage with active Analyze button, FormulaView showing summary bar, energy narrative, patterns with tags/signatures, transitions with energy deltas, section arrangement with energy bars. Verified on live track: 12 patterns, 2 transitions, 13 sections, 2.2s compute. Typecheck clean, zero console errors.

Strata Phase 2: Visualization components — WaveformCanvas + section bands, ArrangementMap swim-lane view, PatternDetailPanel with drum grid, shared zoom/scroll state. Replaces placeholder boxes with canvas-based visualizations.

Strata Phase 5: Standard Tier Analysis Engine — stem separation (demucs), per-stem energy/events/patterns/activity analysis, cross-stem assembly into ArrangementFormula. New modules: separation.py, per_stem.py. Updated engine.py with _run_standard_tier().
Strata Phase 5b: Tier Comparison Mode — Compare toggle, split stacked view with shared zoom/scroll, diff indicators (added/removed patterns/transitions/sections), stats comparison bar. Frontend only.

Strata Phase 2-4: Visualization (ArrangementMap swim-lane, PatternDetailPanel drum grid, shared zoom), interaction polish (hover, cross-highlight, click-to-zoom), edit mode (draft state, inline name/tag editing, save/discard).
Strata Phase 5: Standard Tier — demucs stem separation (cached), per-stem energy/events/patterns/activity, cross-stem transition detection, transition merging. 21 tests pass.
Strata Phase 5b: Tier Comparison — Compare mode (View|Edit|Compare), stacked ArrangementMaps, DiffSummary, pattern/transition/section diff panels.

Strata Phase 6: Pioneer Beatgrid Reanalysis + Multi-Source Comparison. run_reanalysis_pass() re-runs section snap/classify/detect with Pioneer grid (v3). Source-aware storage (fingerprint, tier, source). Engine accepts analysis_version. API: /reanalyze, /versions, source params. Frontend: source selector, reanalyze button. ADR-020. 15 new tests, 450 total pass. UI verification pending (needs Pioneer hardware).

Strata pipeline documentation: docs/strata-pipeline.md with full pipeline diagrams for quick + standard tiers, every tunable constant with file:line + current value + effect, reanalysis pass section, three-source comparison table.

Strata Tier Analysis UX Redesign: backend job tracking (StrataJob/StrataBatchJob), progress polling hooks, multi-select TrackPicker, tier empty states with analyze buttons, batch analysis UI, re-run labels, progress bar with ETA, cooperative cancellation, pattern block toggle, stem waveform default ON.
Fixed demucs.api.Separator not available in demucs 4.0.1. Replaced with demucs.pretrained.get_model + apply_model. Standard tier now completes end-to-end (~90s).

Strata Live Tier: Pioneer-only arrangement analysis from hardware data (phrase analysis, waveform, cue points, beat grid). No audio files needed. Design complete, handoff prompt written. Plan at .claude/plans/hazy-cooking-eclipse.md.

Strata Live Tier: Pioneer-only arrangement analysis from hardware data. LiveStrataAnalyzer.build_from_pioneer() maps phrases→sections, waveform→energy, boundaries→transitions, cues→markers. Wired into PlaybackTracker with on_live_strata callback. WebSocket strata_live broadcast from main.py. Frontend: strataLiveStore (Zustand), WS dispatch, Live tier button in StrataPage with green pulse indicator, ArrangementMap playbackCursorTime prop with vertical cursor line + past-section dimming. TypeScript strict passes, 399 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure unrelated).

Stem-Aware Drum Detector: new StemDrumDetector in percussion_stem.py using multi-band onset detection (kick 20-200Hz, snare 200-5kHz, hihat 5-16kHz) for demucs-isolated drum stems. Replaces M7 heuristic wrapper in per_stem.py. Multi-label (simultaneous kick+snare), adaptive per-track thresholds, snap-to-grid with error tracking. 15 new tests, 230 L1 tests pass, 0 regressions.

Bridge Command Channel BE: Multi-deck scanner refactor (DeckCaptureSlot, queue-based workers, per-player callback routing), scanner API update (target_players param, source_player fix), PSSI phrase parser (anlz_parser.py), local rekordbox library scanner (rekordbox_scanner.py + API), spec update. 220 scanner/bridge tests pass, 0 regressions.

QA Ingestion Page: 10/10 phases PASS. 7 bugs found total across 2 sessions (5 fixed session 1, 4 fixed session 2 — 2 overlapping). 2 open bugs logged (per-deck progress fields, mid-scan USB removal). Critical discovery: scan_complete WS message never emitted by backend + FE/BE status enum mismatch.

QA Ingestion Page: all 10 phases PASS with live XDJ-AZ hardware. 7 bugs found & fixed across 2 sessions: slot selector, PPTH offset, menu normalization, duplicate keys, scan restart, WS scan_complete missing, status enum mismatch. 2 open LOW/MEDIUM: per-deck progress fields, USB removal timeouts.

Investigate bridge restart behavior on USB slot changes. Observed: moving USB from slot 2 (sd) to slot 1 (usb) triggered an automatic bridge restart, recovering the DLP session. Slot 2 removal alone did NOT trigger a restart — browsing stayed broken. Questions: (1) Does the bridge only monitor slot 1 for media changes? (2) Does the XDJ-AZ only broadcast mount/unmount events for slot 1? (3) Is the bridge health check tied to slot 1 specifically? (4) Why does the crash-restart cycle recover DLP for slot 1 but not for slot 2? This is key to understanding the full hot-swap lifecycle and fixing the stale DLP bug. Check: bridge-java BeatLinkBridge.java health check logic, beat-link MountListener/MediaDetailsListener APIs, adapter.py watchdog behavior, manager.py crash detection. See also: docs/bugs/frontend.md 'USB hot-removal breaks DLP browsing' entry.
